task_summary: Add an explicit --live-desk opt-in to isolated mew-ghost while keeping default and --desk-json fixture paths deterministic and non-live.
tests_run: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format state --live-desk --output /tmp/mew-ghost-live-state.json
UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format html --output /tmp/mew-ghost-live-desk.html --live-desk --watch-count 2 --interval 0

verification_evidence.summary: whitespace check passed before report creation
Refreshed current ghost.py, tests/test_mew_ghost.py, and README.md after applied SP18 edits.
Reviewer schema/title closeout applied to ghost.py and tests; focused pytest passed with 27 tests.
Issue #16 top-level live desk normalization repair passed with 28 tests after preserving sleeping -> idle presence mapping.

verification_evidence.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format state --live-desk --output /tmp/mew-ghost-live-state.json
verification_evidence.summary: Operator real opt-in proof rendered schema_version=mew-ghost.sp18.v1, desk.status=typing, desk.live_mew_reads=true, presence.desk.state=coding, and a live-desk dry-run primary_action.

verification_evidence.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format html --output /tmp/mew-ghost-live-desk.html --live-desk --watch-count 2 --interval 0
verification_evidence.summary: Operator HTML watch proof emitted two records with desk_status=typing and presence_state=coding while rewriting the target HTML file.

implemented_contract.live_desk_opt_in: --live-desk explicitly opts into repo-local live desk JSON.
implemented_contract.command_execution: Live desk uses an injected runner/subprocess argument list equivalent to ['./mew', 'desk', '--json'] with shell=false and a short timeout.
implemented_contract.deterministic_defaults: Default rendering and --desk-json remain fixture-only and non-live; --desk-json cannot be combined with --live-desk.
implemented_contract.watch_behavior: Foreground watch reruns the live desk provider on each iteration only when --live-desk is present.
implemented_contract.normalization_surface: Live desk output is normalized through the existing desk status/counts/details/primary_action surface, with desk primary_action kept dry-run, non-executable, and given live-desk dry-run wording when the live payload has no specific description.
implemented_contract.issue_16_precommit_fix: Reviewer issue #16 was caught before commit: current top-level ./mew desk --json payloads with pet_state, focus, counts, details, actions, and current_git now normalize to the same live desk status/count/detail/action surface instead of unknown/empty details; pet_state sleeping intentionally maps to idle via DESK_PET_STATE_TO_PRESENCE.
implemented_contract.live_read_marker: live_mew_reads stays false for defaults and fixtures and is true only for opted-in live desk status.
implemented_contract.schema_version_closeout: Reviewer follow-up closed stale SP17 schema/title surfaces: SCHEMA_VERSION and expected schema are mew-ghost.sp18.v1, module/parser/test specs and HTML title use SP18 where appropriate, and fixture content labels such as Resume SP17 desk bridge remain fixture data.

covered_cases: live desk runner command list and shell=false
current top-level pet_state/focus/counts/details/actions/current_git normalization with sleeping -> idle
watch reruns live desk only when opted in
desk primary_action remains non-executable even with --execute-launchers
README usage examples include terminal and HTML live desk examples
source isolation from core src/mew imports and hidden/background monitoring

notes: SP18 is implemented only under experiments/mew-ghost. The default and --desk-json paths remain deterministic and fixture-only, while --live-desk is the only live desk opt-in and uses an injected/no-shell runner surface in tests. README terminal and HTML examples now document live desk usage. Reviewer follow-up closed stale SP17 schema/title surfaces by moving SCHEMA_VERSION, expected schema, module/parser/test specs, and HTML title to SP18 while preserving fixture labels such as Resume SP17 desk bridge. Reviewer issue #16 was repaired before commit by accepting current top-level live desk payloads, keeping sleeping mapped to idle, and proving the real opt-in path renders live desk status/presence instead of unknown. Issue #17 records the recurring final git_status/git_diff allow-read closeout failure; operator performed the final scope audit manually. No core src/mew imports, hidden/background monitoring, screen capture, network access, or real mew subprocesses are added by the test suite. rescue_edits remains 0; prior blocked attempts are retained as history.
